descriptions.text: Crime Scene Clean is about Sector 7 hides the supernatural from the world. You’re their cleaner—erasing cursed symbols, demonic traces, and forbidden rituals. No fame, no questions. Just silence, speed and survival. Clean haunted scenes, contain threats, and bury the truth before it spreads.

Crime Scene Clean - When the veil between worlds begins to tear, Sector 7 sends you in—not to fight, but to erase. You’re a cleaner, tasked with scrubbing away cursed symbols, demonic residue, and forbidden rituals before the public ever finds out. You didn’t choose this life, but once you’re in, there’s no way out.

You’ll need nerves of steel to handle haunted crime scenes, occult disasters, and interdimensional anomalies. With your specialized gear—ritual scrubbers, spectral vacuums, and odor neutralizers—you’ll clean blood, pack up bodies, and silence the supernatural. All under pressure from ticking clocks, unstable portals, and agents watching your every move.

Key Features Occult Cleanup – Mop up ritual circles, cleanse haunted spaces, and neutralize cursed artifacts. When the smell turns otherworldly, you’ll need more than bleach. Gear Up – Upgrade your tools: stronger UV lamps, enhanced sigil erasers, and high-pressure sanctifiers. Prep before each mission—because failure isn’t an option. Moral Gray Zone – Sector 7 pays well, but temptation lurks. Some relics are too valuable to leave behind. Will you follow protocol or pocket the truth? ️ Buried Truths – You’re not just cleaning—you’re uncovering. Each mission reveals fragments of a deeper conspiracy. What is Sector 7 really hiding?

You’re not the hero. You’re the eraser. The last line between reality and chaos. So grab your mop, keep your head down, and clean like the world depends on it—because it does.
